c.d: The ability for users to rate and review movies within the app.
Features that allow users to connect, share, and discuss movies with friends or a community.
Tools for users to create and manage lists of movies they want to watch.
Information on where movies are available for streaming.
The app provides movie recommendations tailored to the user's preferences.
The overall design and usability of the app.
The operating systems on which the app is available (e.g., iOS, Android).
Any other notable features that enhance the movie rating experience.
